# BetterCallZaal

> Personal site of Zaal Panthaki (BetterCallZaal) — founder of The ZAO, co-founder of WaveWarZ. Open-source builder of AI-agent infrastructure and creator tools that return margin, data & IP to independent artists. 80+ public repos, built in public from Maine, USA.

The brand constellation: BetterCallZaal (personal brand + consulting) -> The ZAO (parent artist organization, 250+ artists and creators, weekly fractal governance since Aug 2024) -> ZABAL (product layer: games, AI agents, $ZABAL token on Base).

The mission: streaming pays artists ~$0.003 per play and labels keep 80-85% of revenue. The ZAO ecosystem builds open-source (MIT) infrastructure so independent artists own their margin, data, and IP.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://bettercallzaal.com/): who Zaal is, portfolio, testimonials, contact
- [Resume](https://bettercallzaal.com/resume/): full CV — BS EE (RIT 2022), $1.5M robotics at PCC Structurals, The Jackson Laboratory, founder history
- [Projects catalog](https://bettercallzaal.com/projects/): 46 open-source projects, all MIT
- [Brand kit](https://bettercallzaal.com/kit.html): 31 brands across the ecosystem (machine-readable at /brands.json)
- [Nexus](https://nexus.thezao.com/): every public link across the ecosystem (~200 links)

## Key projects

- [The ZAO](https://thezao.com): parent artist organization and impact network
- [WaveWarZ](https://wavewarz.com): agentic music battles on Solana — 950+ battles, 459 SOL traded, instant onchain artist payouts
- [ZAOstock](https://bettercallzaal.com/zaostock/): year-1 community music festival — Oct 3, 2026, Ellsworth, Maine, free to attend
- [Hermes Orchestrator](https://github.com/bettercallzaal/hermes-orchestrator): supervisor framework for AI agents (MIT)
- [Zlank](https://github.com/bettercallzaal/zlank): no-code Farcaster Snap builder — won the Snap category at FarHack 2026
- [Daily newsletter](https://paragraph.com/@thezao): 400+ editions, building in public

## Contact

- Email via https://bettercallzaal.com/#contact
